creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
On Sun, 31 May 2009, Pav Lucistnik wrote:
> 3) a lot of ports is picking up libiconv (installed by build-time
> dependencies), linking against it, and then not having it on runtime
> (it's not in their run-time dependency list)

Do you have an idea on how to addres this?  So far I have not had a
good one, I'm afraid.

4) Another common issue I noticed are failures of the kind 
     /usr/bin/ld: cannot find -lgeotiff
   which do not look related to my patch?  Or are they?

Gerald
